---
title: "Static Bonus Website"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
    toc: false
---

<style>
  body {
    margin: 0;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
    background: #f4f9ff;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    color: #102a43;
  }
  .card {
    width: min(700px, 92vw);
    background: #ffffff;
    border: 1px solid #d9e2ec;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 2rem;
    box-shadow: 0 14px 32px rgba(16, 42, 67, 0.08);
  }
  h1 { margin-top: 0; }
  code {
    background: #f0f4f8;
    border: 1px solid #d9e2ec;
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 0.15rem 0.35rem;
  }
</style>

<div class="card">

This page is generated in R

- Build date: <code>`r as.character(Sys.Date())`</code>
- R version used: <code>`r as.character(getRversion())`</code>
- Served through: <code>https://marcnava.42.fr/web</code>

</div>
